# Package databases

## Calphad

- `sample/simple-calcination.lua`: Calcite, Lime, COâ‚‚, Diaspore, Hâ‚‚O, Alâ‚‚Oâ‚ƒ

- `hallstedt1990.lua`: CaOâ€“Alâ‚‚Oâ‚ƒ stoichiometric phases (Hallstedt 1990)

- `hallstedt1990.tdb`: Original CALPHAD TDB source (reference)

- `haas1981.lua`: Haas & Fisher (1981) data for oxides

- `nasa.lua`: NASA gas-phase database (large)


## LaTeX

*WiP*

## Thermo

*WiP*
